title: Sorbus neglecta

intro: Sorbus neglecta, also known as the neglected rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Sorbus neglecta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
